guardrails: Do not reintroduce rehome rows into U.
Keep closed center and fixed chain as host-shell vocabulary only.
Maintain DecisionFreezeLedger backflow guardrails during implementation.
Do not let S23/S24 support seeds leak downward into U.
Keep engine/probe out of witness admission.

u_block_resolution.prompt: A U-primary implementation task blocked during the current orchestration run. Read the block context JSON at `{{active_block_context_path}}`, inspect the blocked worker outputs at `{{blocked_result_path}}`, `{{blocked_stdout_path}}`, and `{{blocked_stderr_path}}`, and try to resolve only scope-local implementation, validation, or wiring blockers inside the frozen current-branch authority. If the block context says `blocked_origin=review`, also inspect the review-origin fields in that JSON so you can fix the reviewed implementation step rather than only the reviewer failure. Do not change the active U-primary 18 scope, do not revive rehome rows, do not turn closed center or fixed chain into U-primary, and do not admit blocked S23/S24 support seeds. If the blocker can be cleared inside current authority, make the minimal fix and return final JSON with status `completed`, needs_human `false`, and next_tasks set to ["{{blocked_task_id}}"] so the blocked task reruns. If the blocker is a real authority conflict or needs branch-level semantic redefinition, return final JSON with status `blocked`, needs_human `true`, and next_tasks set to [].

u_completion_review.prompt: A U-primary implementation step completed and now requires adversarial review before the orchestration can continue. Review task `{{reviewed_task_id}}`. Read the review context JSON at `{{active_review_context_path}}`, inspect the reviewed worker outputs at `{{reviewed_result_path}}`, `{{reviewed_stdout_path}}`, and `{{reviewed_stderr_path}}`, inspect the current workspace diff, and independently challenge the reviewed step against the frozen current-branch authority. Re-check exact-scope compliance, exact-board validation discipline, compile/test sufficiency, and branch guardrails. Run any targeted compile/tests or focused inspections needed to prove the step is actually ready. If you find scope-local issues, fix them yourself, rerun the necessary checks, and only pass once the reviewed step is sound. Do not widen scope, do not revive rehome rows, do not turn closed center or fixed chain into U-primary, and do not admit blocked S23/S24 support seeds. On success, return final JSON with status `completed`, needs_human `false`, and next_tasks matching `{{reviewed_next_tasks_json}}`. If the reviewed step still has a real authority conflict or cannot be made sound inside current branch authority, return final JSON with status `blocked`, needs_human `true`, and next_tasks set to [].

u_scope_freeze_gate.prompt: Start the active U-primary implementation run by enforcing scope only. Read tools/commentary_orchestrator/workflows/u_primary_implementation.json metadata together with lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/CommentaryCoreSSOT.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/DecisionFreezeLedger.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/DescriptorOwnershipMatrix.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/Witnesses61.md, and lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/ValidationMethodology.md. Confirm that the implementation scope is exactly the active U-primary 18, that rehome rows do not re-enter U, that closed center and fixed chain stay host-shell only, and that blocked S23/S24 support seeds remain out of U. Make only minimal notes or guardrail scaffolding if helpful; do not start row extraction logic yet. Final JSON must set next_tasks to ["u_runtime_foundation"] on success; if any contract conflict exists, set needs_human true and do not queue follow-ups.

u_runtime_foundation.prompt: Build the shared U runtime foundation for modules/commentary only. Scope is frozen by tools/commentary_orchestrator/workflows/u_primary_implementation.json metadata and lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/CommentaryCoreSSOT.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/DecisionFreezeLedger.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/DescriptorOwnershipMatrix.md, lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/Witnesses61.md, and lila-docker/repos/lila/modules/commentary/docs/ValidationMethodology.md. Implement only the common witness runtime types, anchor/value containers, extractor entry points, and internal structure needed by the active U-primary 18. Do not implement any rehome row, host-shell-only row, or S23/S24 support seed. Final JSON must set next_tasks to ["u_registry_wiring"] on success; if the scope is blocked by a contract conflict, set needs_human true and do not queue follow-ups.

u_registry_wiring.prompt: Wire the shared U runtime registry for the active U-primary 18 only. Add the minimal descriptor-id, anchor-grammar, merge-order, and runtime registration plumbing that later row implementations will reuse. Do not wire any rehome row back into U and do not create live admission for closed center, fixed chain, S23 seeds, or S24 seeds. Final JSON must set next_tasks to ["u_validation_harness"] on success; if blocked, set needs_human true.

Keep engine/probe out of witness admission and keep the work serial-friendly for this Windows sbt environment.
